note_text: Arrived on site after repeated cooling_alarm alerts. Confirmed Thermal management exceeded the safe operating threshold. and isolated charger port 1.
Reviewed controller logs and verified issue window matched customer complaints from peak demand period.
Applied resolution step update_firmware. Monitored two successful restart cycles before returning asset to service.
Recommended follow-up SOP review for cable inspection and connector cleaning during next preventive maintenance window.
